name: Limitless Wearable Capture
description: Limitless Pendant adapter for the wearable-capture-core engine. Polls the Limitless lifelog API and atomizes each recording into a title atom plus one section atom per `##` heading (the label with its rolled-up utterances), attributed to its speakers — the device's own structure, no per-item LLM cost. Per-atom salted-fingerprint dedup and provenance via the core.
